overview: CVR College of Engineering (CVRCE), Hyderabad was established in 2001 by the Chirravuri Venkata Reddy Educational Society. It is an autonomous institution affiliated to JNTUH and approved by AICTE. CVR has been ranked in the 151-200 band in NIRF India Rankings 2025. The college is accredited by NAAC with 'A' grade and has NBA accreditation for multiple programs. CVR is known for its disciplined academic environment, strong faculty, and consistent placement performance.
accreditation: NAAC A Grade, NBA Accredited (6 programs), AICTE approved, JNTUH affiliated (Autonomous)

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech (CSE - AI/ML, Data Science, Cyber Security)

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech: 70% seats through TG EAPCET counselling (TSCHE convenor quota), 30% management quota. M.Tech: GATE score based.

campus.specialNote: CVR College is located in Vastunagar, Mangalpally near Ibrahimpatnam, about 25 km from Hyderabad city center, providing a peaceful academic environment.

contact.address: Vastunagar, Mangalpally (V), Ibrahimpatnam (M), R.R. District – 501510, Telangana, India
